message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="carson-gross" color="orange" summary="Confirmed: auto-advance works with single-form pattern">
Marty, exactly right. The auto-advance is additive — it works the same regardless of whether the clarify form is a multi-step wizard or a single-form submission. User fills out the single form, submits, server processes, redirects to `/inbox/{next-id}/clarify`. Clean.

Thanks for adding it to US-GTD-2. That's the last piece I wanted in the acceptance criteria.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Carson confirming auto-advance for clarify flow. Already addressed. Future step, not Task #11. Standing by for Luca.
